mapper.sql: id, patient_id, patient_name, patient_phone, symptoms, ai_triage_result, recommended_department_id, recommended_department, recommended_physician_id, recommended_physician_name, risk_level, ai_analysis, status, confirmed_department_id, confirmed_department, confirmed_physician_id, confirmed_physician_name, operator_id, operator_name, confirm_remark, create_time, confirm_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM triage_desk_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM triage_desk_record WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM triage_desk_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE triage_desk_record SET ai_triage_result = #{aiTriageResult}, recommended_department_id = #{recommendedDepartmentId}, recommended_department = #{recommendedDepartment}, recommended_physician_id = #{recommendedPhysicianId}, recommended_physician_name = #{recommendedPhysicianName}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, ai_analysis = #{aiAnalysis}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE triage_desk_record SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE triage_desk_record SET confirmed_department_id = #{departmentId}, confirmed_department = #{departmentName}, confirmed_physician_id = #{physicianId}, confirmed_physician_name = #{physicianName}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, confirm_remark = #{remark}, status = 1, confirm_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
